title: Renovate settings page UI and add i18n keys for new UI text
description: Redesign the settings page and modal with improved visual hierarchy, consistent form controls, and better organization of settings groups. Update i18n/zh.js with all new translation keys introduced across the renovation (ARIA labels, empty states, loading text, result counts, new settings labels). Ensure settings page maintains full backward compatibility with DataManager getter/setter API.

criteria: Settings page has clear visual hierarchy: section headers with consistent typography, grouped settings with subtle dividers
Settings modal uses role='dialog' and aria-modal='true' with proper focus trap
All form controls (toggles, inputs, selects) have visible labels and consistent sizing
Settings page reads/writes through existing DataManager methods (getAutoMountConfig, getShortcutSettings, getConfirmationSettings, getLogLevel) with no API changes
i18n/zh.js contains all new translation keys: ARIA labels, empty state messages, loading text, result count template, settings section headers
No changes to user-data.json schema or DataManager data contracts
convergence.verification: Open settings page, verify all controls work and save correctly. Check i18n/zh.js has entries for all new t() calls in panel/index.js.

files.change: Redesign settings page layout with clear section headers, grouped controls, consistent form element styling, and visual dividers between sections
Add/refine CSS for settings sections, form controls, section headers, and dividers
Improve modal backdrop, focus trapping, and close button styling
Add all new i18n keys for ARIA labels, empty states, loading indicators, result count templates, and improved settings section headers

implementation: Audit current settings page layout in renderSettingsContent: identify settings groups (auto-mount, shortcuts, confirmations, log level) and their visual presentation
Design improved settings layout: clear section headers (font-size, font-weight, border-bottom), grouped controls with consistent spacing, subtle dividers between groups
Update renderSettingsContent to generate improved HTML with section containers, proper form labels, and consistent control sizing
Add CSS for settings improvements: .settings-section, .settings-group, .settings-label, .settings-control, .settings-divider classes
Improve settings modal: ensure backdrop covers full panel, add focus trap (trap Tab/Shift+Tab within modal), improve close button with proper aria-label
Collect all new t() key references from TASK-001, TASK-002, TASK-003 changes and add corresponding entries to i18n/zh.js

Add i18n keys: ARIA_SEARCH_INPUT, ARIA_SETTINGS_BUTTON, ARIA_FAVORITE_TOGGLE, ARIA_DELETE_BUTTON, ARIA_MOVE_LEFT, ARIA_MOVE_RIGHT, SEARCH_LOADING, SEARCH_EMPTY, SEARCH_RESULT_COUNT, SETTINGS_SECTION_AUTOMOUNT, SETTINGS_SECTION_SHORTCUTS, SETTINGS_SECTION_CONFIRMATIONS, SETTINGS_SECTION_LOGGING
Verify all settings still save correctly through DataManager (no data contract changes)

reference.pattern: Existing settings page generation in renderSettingsContent and DataManager API

rationale.chosen_approach: Improve settings page visual design while maintaining exact same DataManager API calls; batch all i18n additions into one task for consistency
alternatives_considered: Separate i18n task (too small on its own, couples tightly with UI changes)
Restructure settings into tabbed interface (over-engineering for current settings count)
decision_factors: Settings groups are logical visual units
rationale.tradeoffs: This task depends on knowing all new i18n keys from other tasks, so should be executed after or in parallel with awareness of other task changes

manual_checks: Settings page opens with clear visual hierarchy and grouped sections
All settings toggle/change and persist after panel close/reopen
Settings modal traps focus and closes with Escape key
Chinese text displays correctly for all new i18n keys
user-data.json format unchanged after settings modification
success_metrics: All new t() calls in panel/index.js have corresponding keys in i18n/zh.js
Settings save/load round-trip preserves all values
